name: Minimize main.py while preserving exact submission hash

description: baseline: current full pipeline with exact hash; added run_pipeline.sh/autoresearch.sh/autoresearch.md benchmark harness
AST-based syntax-preserving minification: removed docstrings/comments via unparse and stripped function annotations; main.py 130112→112003 chars with exact hash and slightly faster runtime
Removed report/config/save machinery, switched to direct train.csv/test.csv reads, always rebuild artifacts fresh, and simplified run_pipeline to only fit + write submission
Removed extra annotated-assignment syntax, deleted the semantic-context dataclass wrapper, and trimmed more setup bookkeeping while preserving the exact train/test pipeline
Removed a few more dead imports/parameters and collapsed semantic-context capture/activation to plain tuple passing
Shortened a batch of long internal identifiers (semantic/scenario/override plumbing names) with no behavior change
Shortened another batch of long global constants/column-set identifiers (USECOLS/raw/string map names etc.) with no behavior change
Shortened another batch of common local variable names (feature/mask/probability/temp counters etc.) with no behavior change
Shortened helper-method names and more common locals (curve/scenario/train-temp names etc.) with no behavior change; pruned stale idea backlog entry
Shortened class/import aliases, more helper/function names, and several remaining long tuning constants with no behavior change
Shortened several internal engineered feature/column names (device_family, hard-rule/scenario names, residual-calibration prefixes, etc.) with no behavior change

Shortened another batch of internal identifiers (feature ratio names, helper args, cross-validation and integrity variables, etc.) with no behavior change; main.py 87820→84931 chars while preserving exact submission hash

Removed the dead first tune_threshold method and shortened another broad batch of helper names, constants, and internal feature-column names with no behavior change; main.py 84931→81646 chars while preserving the exact submission hash

Shortened another broad batch of residual/scenario/curve feature names plus remaining helper, attribute, and local identifiers with no behavior change; main.py 81646→77940 chars while preserving the exact submission hash

Shortened another batch of remaining hard-rule names, tuning locals, fold-feature columns, and residual/freqdroop feature names with no behavior change; main.py 77940→75888 chars while preserving the exact submission hash
Tried hoisting stateless helper methods to module scope, but a naive prefix replacement corrupted calls like self._nsm/self._ncm into undefined globals; reverted after NameError during fit
Hoisted the stateless math/selection helpers out of class scope and updated call sites with a safer exact replacement pass; main.py 75888→74686 chars while preserving the exact submission hash
Tried another broad local-name shortening pass, but one rename collided in _bta so the family DataFrame and directory path both became fd, breaking to_parquet with a pandas/path TypeError; reverted

Shortened another safe batch of remaining local identifiers plus the last long internal DC/freqdroop/target feature names, with a narrower non-colliding rename set after the prior crash; main.py 74686→73484 chars while preserving the exact submission hash

Shortened another safe batch of shared column/field constants plus remaining one-off locals and internal feature names (DC, phase-error, freqdroop, watt-limit terms) with no behavior change; main.py 73484→72246 chars while preserving the exact submission hash

Hoisted another batch of pure helper functions (encoding/binning/hash/stat aggregation/candidate builders) out of class scope and fixed their signatures for direct global calls; main.py 72246→71807 chars while preserving the exact submission hash
Tried another rename pass on remaining locals/feature names, but renaming cat_features also rewrote the CatBoost fit keyword to an invalid cfs= argument; reverted

Hoisted another batch of pure helpers (_cn/_bsw/_bsf/_bsk/_bok/_afi) out of class scope and shortened internal hyperparameter attribute names while preserving external library keyword args; main.py 71807→71294 chars with exact submission hash

Applied another exact-token shortening pass on remaining local variables and internal feature terms (residual magnitudes, mode flags, DC/freqdroop temporaries, curve metadata, and capacity-rating locals) without touching external API keywords; main.py 71294→70591 chars with exact submission hash
